overall.description: Cinematic game footage of a gothic wizarding classroom or common room with stone walls, arched windows, and magical artifacts. A character enters from the right and walks across the circular rug toward another figure standing by the window, while the camera remains stationary throughout the clip.

decorative tapestry hanging on the stone wall near the window

segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic wizarding common room with stone walls and a large circular rug in the center. Morning light streams through a tall arched window on the left, illuminating the curved wooden bench seating and study tables. A figure in dark robes stands motionless near the window on the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic wizarding common room with circular seating and study tables

events.description: the player character enters from the right side and begins walking across the circular rug toward the center

agents.ego_description: walking across the circular rug toward the figure standing by the left window

notable_agents.action: still standing by the window, now facing the entering character

segments.scene_description: The player character enters the room from the right and walks across the circular patterned rug toward the figure standing by the window. The camera remains stationary, capturing the movement across the room as the character approaches the left side where the other figure waits.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static view of a gothic wizarding common room as a solitary figure is approached by a newcomer. It begins with a still composition of stone walls and a large circular rug, where morning light streams through a tall arched window to illuminate curved wooden benches and study tables. As the scene unfolds, a figure in dark robes remains motionless by the window on the left side of the frame. The stillness then shifts as the player character enters from the right, walking steadily across the patterned rug toward the waiting figure. The camera remains stationary throughout, tracking the character's progress across the room until they reach the light-filled area by the window.
